title: hieracium pannosum subsp. reductum
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. reductum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, while also providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Hieracium pannosum subsp. reductum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
